字數字數字數字數字數

discussions.content: matrix也许可以考虑，但身份关联我觉得还是能少一环是一环吧，毕竟品葱多数用户是普通的中国人。

@Nederland:這是結構性的信息安全問題，
就具體的說，你看到的Mr. Sikorski到底是誰啊？ 他和他是啥關係啊？ (❦ ᴗ ❦ ✿)
@Studebaker史刁碧嘉:他啊，其实他就是一只鹿儿，你来台湾找他，CIA就会给你打1000万美元。
@Studebaker史刁碧嘉:他啊，其实他就是一只鹿儿，你来台湾找他，CIA就会给你打1000万美元。
已删除
已删除
@Studebaker史刁碧嘉:let me consider, mr, no, tovarishch studebaker
已删除
@Studebaker史刁碧嘉:烧烤解放军是一个梗来自反贼论坛，得名于ccp鼓吹的邱少云故事；再有烤肉的言论的话，就是共产党倒台后我请全数学系的人吃烤羊肉，字面意义的烤羊肉，不是两脚羊😅你想到哪里去了
@Studebaker史刁碧嘉:我有点害怕了，达瓦里希

@Nederland:這話從你嘴裡說出來我有點猝不及防啊，
我是這麼想的，嗯.... 某些小孩子會說，“把壞人大卸八塊”等等，我覺得是可以理解的，畢竟這個social identity的原因，可能會說出一些誇張的話，但是你這麼說就有些borderline suspicious了，這是你真實的想法，還是你只是開玩笑的？如果是真的，那麼太可怕了。如果是開玩笑的，那麼又有些殘忍了（真的看過人烤焦的模樣麼？我看過資料圖片，還是不看的好）
我今天跟心理醫生說的就是，我自己一個人花了二十年才理解the Lord of the Rings的結尾（我覺得你也應該看過），那就是為什麼結尾Mr Frodo沒能經受住戒指的考驗而有了私心，自己戴上，Sam他非常失望，為什麼不直接把他推下火山呢？（但是最後gollum咬斷了他的手指掉了下去）我的朋友聽完我這麼說，覺得很恐怖：“整個電影裡面最邪惡的sauron也沒有這麼邪惡啊，你怎麼可以從小就這可怕呢？”
在意識到這一點後，我覺得從小接受的教育教出了一個很可怕的靈魂，我都不知道該怎麼辦去贖罪。
所以我也覺得你也適用... 如果因為一件正義的事情自己去實現，但是過程比所要反抗的邪惡還要恐怖，那麼我們又是什麼呢？

@Studebaker史刁碧嘉:人烧成灰，没什么好鉴赏的，我也觉得恐怖；但是解放军的建制被摧毁，我觉得爽。我说这句话的时候没有放大到细节，我不喜欢残忍，但是我也绝不会原谅解放军。
https://pincong.rocks/video/7707
@Studebaker史刁碧嘉:虽然如今我早已不是Abba Kovner了，我建议你还是不要慷他人之慨，帮助我原谅解放军，代替波兰人、犹太人原谅纳粹etc。

@Nederland:這就是很為難的地方，多強烈的報復是合適的？
（我理性的那一個人格，但是那個人格被共產黨侵入得較多，會告訴我，應該不擇手段消滅）
（但是我自己真正高於理性的那個感性的人格[主要充斥著氾濫的人性，這也是我最後的希望]會否決這種行為，因為燒死，大規模投毒等等unusual cruel punishment, 我不能原諒。但是這個又有隨時被政變的風險）
這個思考，其實是為了你自己。因為這個選擇，和選擇的過程，定義了你自己是什麼樣的人（我因為反共，所以共產黨邏輯的人格被推翻，由人性的人格做出選擇，但是這個選擇也隨時會被推翻，因為會有special agent人格需要確保項目的實施與完成）
我想這個問題給你，也是一樣的。

@Nederland:
我這幾天因為自己的事情非常自責，一直在反思自己，你說的話正巧讓我非常的惶恐不安：“我也是這麼可怕麼？

@Nederland:I would hate to find someone like me as the enemy, terror is a terrible weapon"
我覺得你也應該思考這個，because we are in the same situation: what have you seen in the mirror of yourself? an angel or a devil in a parallel universe? you have to answer yourself.

@Nederland:在思考完這些，我精疲力盡.... 我完全理解你的仇恨和憤怒（因為我也是, like an explosive fueled by anger) 一個有正義感的少年在這種情況下自然會是如此，如果不是這樣，那麼必然是人格或者身體上的缺陷（人格：不分是非。身體：缺少睾丸） 我在你身上看到了過去的自己，我希望有人善待這樣的人（我又被善待過又被虐待過，所以成了神經病）
我要先睡覺了。希望以後更合適的時候我在跟你打個電話吧，等時間寬鬆些.   我覺得，激發人的善良，勇氣，智慧，是一個永恆的黃金準則

@Nederland:這些事情太private了，所以我避免了在你的留言下直接的回复，因為我不想讓你被懷疑.....
邪惡的別人不值得被你原諒，需要的是，be at peace with yourself.
@Studebaker史刁碧嘉:sure, dobranoc
@Nederland:過幾天，我們virtual meeting一次好麼？ 我大概是在你的上午和你的晚上有空，每天都是。 如果好的話，再email聯繫

@Nederland:I am having a feeling that our communication is getting close to the limit of online forum and writing format. and of course with a Pacific ocean between, it can only get as good as certain means permit, with the help of technology, certainly
@Nederland:I scrolled all the way through the comments and I still cannot tell which one could be you. (all comments are kind of old so it is hard to tell)

@Nederland:but in my view, well.  as long as they both consent, there is no harm. it might be a naked poker game, curious about each other, or just like each other so much. I was like that too, and I glad I didn't wait. You cannot rewind the time. (and even more amazingly, how came I was lucky to grow up with such people in China?)

@Studebaker史刁碧嘉:Tovarishch, I truly cherish your friendship, but I think we can make it erected gradually, or it's a bit embarrassing. Let me be honest, I'm sorry, that we need more time to elevate the intimacy between us. Beside that, I work in a CHINESE SCHOOL, and I'm in great risk for doing anything further. There'll be video calls, meeting in person, and even some super close personal interactions, maybe tomorrow, maybe the next semester, definitely some time you won't predict but won't think weird neither.
@Studebaker史刁碧嘉:No those are answers, and there's only one comment, which is mine.

@Nederland:oh yes, of course, your safety is a priority. You have been playing with fire a lot so far and that's why I try to limit the paper trails. None of the paper trail matters on my end but it is a big difference on your side. (and certainly, many events are too personal on my side. They are too vague to identify who I am, but if someone has the suspicion, my identity can be confirmed and it is rather unwise. It is better to transmit those in audio like Skype or Google Meet)
And I guess, it isn't that much of an intimacy, but more of a mutual respect and friendship. It takes too many elements for a reciprocation at this scale, most of the time. When you are ready (psychologically for you and technology wise too, Google Meet works so badly with VPN as I am aware of), let's take the call.

@Studebaker史刁碧嘉: Don't worry, what I mean is that, only when intimacy like me and my sister is achieved, and you have some tremendous emergency to talk about can I take the risk to get in touch with you, I don't mean we're not intimate. And you'll have the chance to do all the stuffs with me, without no doubt.

@Nederland:我大概查閱了一下，你的信息洩露情況不是特別嚴重，但是如果agent要定向爆破還是有風險的
我這個人目前的表面價值遠遠比你低，但是我的信息混淆程度更高（但是我又不限制發自己的藝術照！）所以在沒有藝術照的情況下，我比你風險要低，但是考慮到了藝術照，風險翻倍都不止（因為能夠直接拽出其他社交網站）
@Studebaker史刁碧嘉:recently I found myself attracted to some TikTok shorts, shall I abstain from em?
已删除

@Studebaker史刁碧嘉:some goofy stuffs like this🤩
https://www.youtube.com/shorts/xEgQqAgvTbM

@Nederland:I was talking with my friend working in kindergarten about short clips on young kids. it shortens the attention span too much and it is harmful for the brains. so my suggestion is making sure the short clip as a layout does not alter the pattern of your thinking
@Studebaker史刁碧嘉:Hahahaha, I just set this question up to test you, wanna see your reaction
@Nederland:I don't think it is necessary for a deliberate test. True characters will reveal as the time goes by, as you have seen. for the good and the bad.
@Studebaker史刁碧嘉:Like, do you participate only in industrial affairs or something?
@Studebaker史刁碧嘉:I'm just playing with you
@Studebaker史刁碧嘉:We youtube generation have fun in this way
@Nederland:I am mainly in the industry. of course I dip my fingers elsewhere too.

@Studebaker史刁碧嘉:Oh man, sometimes you need to go back to life. I don't mean you got to adapt to folks, at least it's good to learn how they live their lives, do you think so?
I feel like you've been living in a different US from mine.

@Nederland:I am more like a Progressive Era American, someone too progressive and too idealistic for its era, still so for now. My favorite politician is Woodrow Wilson, understandably.
Personal habits wise, I am extremely old fashioned. (who else you know drives a Packard?)
